pwa.label: Install app
pwa.title: Install Stellaris
pwa.description: Install Stellaris for quicker launch, offline shell support, and a cleaner full-screen workspace.
pwa.nativeReady: Your browser can open the install window now.
pwa.manualHint: If the browser does not show the install window, use the steps below.
pwa.manualFootnote: Some in-app browsers hide installation controls. Open this page in Safari, Chrome, or Edge if needed.

steps.ios2: Tap Share, then choose Add to Home Screen.
steps.android2: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
steps.desktop1: Open the browser menu or the install icon in the address bar.
